content.en:
Sunset Palace.

Each Eternal Controller above the Seventh Realm has an independent space, and each independent space seems to stand in a time and space, and the core of the convergence of many time and space is the location of the auction table, and a Nine Realms level controller from the headquarters of the Boundary River Chamber of Commerce will auction items as an auctioneer.

Ye Tian was already standing in a space-time space on the periphery, after all, he was only an eight-realm level controller, and the real realm still hadn't reached the nine-realm level controller, because he could only be in the outer space-time.

And the space close to the inner enclosed time and space can only be controlled by those above the ninth realm.

Status can be seen just from the spatial position.

And Ye Tian quickly sensed an acquaintance, the Qing Se Controller, and the space-time space where the other party was located was not far from Ye Tian.

Seeing Qing Se's controller, Ye Tian felt a little embarrassed in his heart.

He was too familiar with the Qingse Controller, of course he was physically familiar, after all, he copied the body of the Qingse Controller.

But this matter, the Qingse controller doesn't know, if he knows, the Qingse controller will definitely find him desperately.

"Infinite Master!"

The Qing Se controller also sensed Ye Tian and said hello.

And Ye Tian also responded: "Qingse controller, meet again!"

The two chatted briefly for a few words, and naturally did not continue to speak.

At this time.

There are still Eternal Masters coming here, but there is not a single Ten Realms level Masters who finally come here.

At the very least, Ye Tian hadn't seen a Ten Realm-level controller.

"It seems that the circle of Ten Realm-level controllers is one level higher, and such an auction can't attract Ten Realm-level controllers!" Ye Tian said darkly.

From the point of view.

The Seven Realms to the Nine Realms Masters belong to a circle, but the status of the Nine Realms Masters is far superior to the Seven Realms Masters, but the circle is still together.

And the Ten Realms-level masters are above the other circle, as long as the great existence does not make a move, the Ten Realms-level masters are invincible existences.

And the Ten Elements Ancestors, they belong to the next circle!

After a long time, almost all the people who came to participate arrived, and if they didn't come at this time, they basically didn't come.

After all, the speed of the Seven Realms-level controllers was so fast, no matter where they were, they all came.

It didn't take long for the auction to begin.

Presiding over the auction this time was the Nine-Realm Level Controller of the Boundary River Chamber of Commerce's headquarters, Kitano Controller.

Kitano took out the first lot.

"Next, the first auction item, the Blood Yang Dragon Spirit Fruit, can help the Eternal Controller to raise the Eighth-level Control Body to the Ninth-Level Control Body. Its owner wanted a treasure that would increase the strength of the will, suitable for the Eternal Will of the late Ninth Order. The auction starts now, and those who want to bid can make their own bids, and the owner of the Blood Yang Dragon Spirit Fruit will decide!" said Kitano Controller.

"The Blood Yang Dragon Spirit Fruit is indeed a good thing!"

Ye Tian muttered.

It took a lot of energy for him to upgrade the eighth-level mastery body to the ninth-level mastery body, and he saw it casually here, but if he wanted to obtain such a treasure, he had to pay an equivalent item, otherwise people wouldn't sell it.

Exchange the treasure that improves the will for the treasure that improves the body of control, and the other party does not lose.

Of course, if no one wants to trade, it will be lost.

In this kind of bartering auction, it is naturally normal for the auction to be unsuccessful.

Soon.

A Seven Realm-level master has made a bid.

"I'll give you a purple thunder source!"

This Seven Realms level master said.

The Purple Thunder Source is also a treasure that helps to enhance the will, if it is at the extreme of the late ninth order, a purple thunder source will indeed help break the shackles and break through to the peak realm of the ninth order.

However, the value of the Purple Thunder Source was slightly worse, not as good as the Blood Yang Dragon Spirit Fruit.

After a while, another Eternal Master spoke, "I'll take out a Purple Thunder Source plus Passion Soul Grass. "

Passion Soul Grass also helps with the Late Ninth Order Will Increase, but it is useless against the Ninth Order Peak Will.

But if the Purple Thunder Source is added to the Passion Soul Grass, the value is about the same as the Blood Yang Dragon Spirit Fruit.

At this time, no one else is offering.

"Congratulations to the Dust River Controller for bidding for the Blood Yang Dragon Spirit Fruit with the Passion Soul Grass and a Purple Thunder Source. Kitano said.

Next, one item after another was auctioned.

In the beginning, the items auctioned were only useful to the Seven Realms Masters, but they were of little value to the Eight Realms Masters.

Finally.

The treasures that are all valuable to the masters of the Eight Realms have been auctioned.

"The next auction item is the Black Water Demon Crystal, presumably many Eternal Masters know its name, it comes from the depths of the Boundary Beyond the Boundary River, and it is incomparably far away, far away from the Boundary River and the Origin Boundary Sea, in the Lost Region. The Black Water Demon Crystal is extremely rare, but its value is very high, and it has a 1 percent chance of forcibly allowing the ninth-level mastery body to forcibly break into the primordial-level mastery body. The owner of this auction wants a life source heart, as long as anyone has a life source heart, they can directly complete the transaction. If not, then the treasure that heals the injuries of the Seven Realms level controllers is needed, and the bidding starts now!" said the Kitano master.

At this time.

Many of the controllers were surprised to exchange the Black Water Demon Crystal for healing.

It's a waste to exchange such good things for healing things.

But the other party's injuries must be very serious, and they can't be healed on their own, otherwise they won't change the healing things.

"In the Origin Realm Sea, there are only a few Seven Realm-level masters who need healing, and it should be one of them. "

"It's a pity that I don't have a life source heart, otherwise I would really have to bid for it. Black Water Demon Crystal, I can promote my control body to a primordial control body, and my strength will skyrocket!"

"The other party shouldn't have been mortally injured in order to seize the Black Water Demon Crystal, right?"

"It should be possible, if you want to obtain the Black Water Demon Crystal, the price is not low, and the other party is likely to be injured because of this. "

While many of the Eternal Masters were talking, one of the Eternal Masters made a bid.

This is still someone Ye Tian knows-the master of Qingse.

The accumulation of Qing Se's controller is enough, and she has condensed the realm of will transformation, which is very close to the Nine Realms level controller, if she obtains the Black Water Demon Crystal and condenses the primordial level control body, there is really hope that she will be directly promoted to the Nine Realms level controller.

Even if he can't be promoted, his strength will reach the extreme of the Eight Realm-level masters.

The Qing Se controller took out the Life Source Heart, and naturally directly photographed the Black Water Demon Crystal.
